_comment: Main_10_optimisation_BO_surrogate_vs_cantera.ipynb — Optuna GP-BO over the Main_8 SR surrogate, validated against Cantera. See docs/ML_CONFIG_GUIDE.md.
_processed_stem_comment: Pins data/processed/features_targets_training_data_complete_<stem>.pkl (course default: the sample150 release dataset). Set to null for the newest features_targets_*.pkl.
_n_trials_comment: Course default sized for free Colab (GPSampler refits grow with trial count); research-scale value was 150.
